name: Lava Land
author: Poki
description: Lava Land is an action game where your mission is to reach the helicopter and escape the rising sea of hot lava! You start on the only patch of green land surrounded by fiery danger. Jump from one platform to another, staying one step ahead of the lava. But be careful—those platforms may look stable, but they can shift or disappear when you least expect it! It's the ultimate test of your agility and strategy. Do you have what it takes to escape from Lava Land? How to play Lava Land? Move: WASD or the arrow keys Jump: the space bar Who created Lava Land? Lava Land is created by Chinatsu. Play their other games on Poki: Dungeon Dash and Farm Battles ! How can I play Lava Land for free? You can play Lava Land for free on Poki. Can I play Lava Land on mobile devices and desktop? Lava Land can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
